title: More Potent, Less Peccant.
content:
He that may sin, sins least: leave to transgress
    Enfeebles much the seeds of wickedness.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "More Potent, Less Peccant."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
